name: Forward_DCT_Integer
operator_description: Performs forward Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) on 8x8 pixel blocks using integer arithmetic for JPEG compression. This module contains two implementations: (1) Accurate integer DCT (jfdctint) with high precision using scaled integer constants, suitable for high-quality encoding; (2) Fast integer DCT (jfdctfst) with reduced accuracy but faster execution, suitable for real-time applications. Both implementations transform spatial domain pixel data into frequency domain coefficients, enabling efficient compression through quantization and entropy coding.
